svg.title: MediRisk Intelligence Platform — end-to-end pipeline architecture
svg.desc: Flow from Data Sources through Bronze, Silver, Gold, ML Model, Snowflake, to Dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the claims data source in MediRisk')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the patients data source in MediRisk')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the transactions data source in MediRisk')
sendPrompt('Explain the Bronze ingestion layer in MediRisk')
g.text: Schema enforcement · DQ tagging · Partitioned Parquet · 100% pass rate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Silver transformation layer in MediRisk')
g.text: Dedup · Date casting · Null guards · Window deduplication

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the Gold feature engineering layer in MediRisk')
g.text: 90-day rolling windows · Patient risk scores · Provider risk summary

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Explain the fraud detection ML model in MediRisk')
sendPrompt('Explain the Snowflake layer in MediRisk')
sendPrompt('Explain the Streamlit dashboard in MediRisk')
g.text: Streamlit dashboard — fraud alerts · patient risk · trends
localhost:8501 · Airflow DAG orchestration · pytest 31 unit tests
